title: Throttle Body Relearn
symptoms: Rough idle after throttle body cleaning or replacement
Idle hunting or stalling at stops
P0505/P0506/P0507 idle air control codes after battery disconnect or ECU reset
prerequisites: Vehicle stationary with parking brake ON
warnings: Engine must be at operating temperature — do not run on cold engine
All electrical accessories must be OFF or learned idle will be too high
After procedure: turn ignition OFF for 10 seconds before restarting
techstream_path: Engine → Utility → Throttle / Motor Drive / Learn

steps.technical_detail: Verify Engine ECU communication (TesterPresent 0x3E 0x80 to 0x700). Visual checks for operating temperature, accessories off, vehicle stationary.
steps.caution: Cannot electronically verify temperature or accessory state — mechanic must confirm visually

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x03 to Engine ECU (0x700).
steps.caution: If rejected: verify ignition state and connection

steps.technical_detail: UDS RoutineControl (0x31) start (0x01) for Routine ID 0x0120. ECM sequence: (1) commands throttle plate fully closed → records minimum ADC count, (2) commands throttle plate fully open → records maximum ADC count, (3) returns to idle position, (4) stores learned values in non-volatile memory. Duration: ~3-5 seconds. After start response (0x71), poll results with sub-function 0x03.
steps.caution: Throttle plate will physically move during this routine — normal. Do not touch accelerator pedal.

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x01. Post-procedure: turn ignition OFF 10 seconds, restart, let idle for 3 minutes. Smooth idle = success.
steps.caution: Turn ignition OFF for at least 10 seconds before restarting to allow ECM to commit learned values

routine_ids.0x0120: Throttle Body Motor Drive / Learn (Toyota ENGINE ECU 0x700)

post_procedure_steps: Start engine and let it idle for 3 minutes
Verify idle quality is smooth with no hunting or stalling
Test throttle response at low RPM
outcome_summary: Commands throttle plate through full range to learn minimum and maximum ADC positions. Stores in non-volatile memory. Resolves rough idle and P0505/P0506/P0507 codes after throttle body service, cleaning, or battery disconnect. ~3-5 second procedure.
